title: Slow Cooked Australian Pork Skewers
description: A lazy Sunday Australian dish featuring ginger paste and sous-vide cooking, resulting in a floral and velvety keto-friendly meal. This recipe is perfect for a relaxing weekend dinner.
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 130 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together ginger paste, coconut milk, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the pork cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated pork cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Place the skewers in the sous-vide machine and cook for 24 hours.
Remove the skewers from the machine and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Let the skewers rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Slice the skewers into individual portions and serve immediately.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F and let it rest for 3 minutes before serving.
